'''tashuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbridge|roadbridge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbridge|roadbridge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tashuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshiwith|tæshiwith]] || [[word:tæshiwij|tæshiwij]] || [[word:tæshiwish|tæshiwish]] || [[word:tæshiwi|tæshiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashushuwuth|tashushuwuth]] || [[word:tashushuwuj|tashushuwuj]] || [[word:tashushuwush|tashushuwush]] || [[word:tashushuwu|tashushuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashuwuth|tashuwuth]] || [[word:tashuwuj|tashuwuj]] || [[word:tashuwush|tashuwush]] || [[word:tashuwu|tashuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashufwuth|tashufwuth]] || [[word:tashufwuj|tashufwuj]] || [[word:tashufwush|tashufwush]] || [[word:tashufwuf|tashufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashuwuthu|tashuwuthu]] || [[word:tashuwuju|tashuwuju]] || [[word:tashuwushu|tashuwushu]] || [[word:tashuwuku|tashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashuwuth|tashuwuth]] || [[word:tashuwuj|tashuwuj]] || [[word:tashuwush|tashuwush]] || [[word:tashuwu|tashuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashuwuthul|tashuwuthul]] || [[word:tashuwujul|tashuwujul]] || [[word:tashuwushul|tashuwushul]] || [[word:tashuwukul|tashuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashuwuthuthu|tashuwuthuthu]] || [[word:tashuwujuju|tashuwujuju]] || [[word:tashuwushushu|tashuwushushu]] || [[word:tashuwuku|tashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashuwuthun|tashuwuthun]] || [[word:tashuwujun|tashuwujun]] || [[word:tashuwushun|tashuwushun]] || [[word:tashuwukun|tashuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashuwuthuoro|tashuwuthuoro]] || [[word:tashuwujuoro|tashuwujuoro]] || [[word:tashuwushuoro|tashuwushuoro]] || [[word:tashuwukuoro|tashuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
